}].concat(

,
Array.from(result).map(x=>{

)

}
 else if (baseUrl.startsWith('data')) {

      return {

    };

else {

java.toast('\n欢迎🎉');
let url = "https://gitee.com/api/v5/repos/fengying915/yuedu/git/trees/main";
let rr = java.ajax(url);
let trs = com.jayway.jsonpath.JsonPath.read(rr, '$..tree[*]');
let re = '首页::data:;base64,qq,{"type":"sy"}\n';
for (let tr of trs) {
    let nm = tr.path;
    if (/^[一-ꀀ]/.test(nm)) {
        let ur=tr.url;
     re += nm+'::'+ur+'\n';
}
}
Packages.java.lang.Thread.sleep(100);
re
</js>
